'''Grashk''' was a young [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Wookiee/Legends|Wookiee]]. After joining the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Alliance to Restore the Republic]], he worked with [[Tamarc]], [[Almera Zan]], and [[Roz]] to attempt to rescue [[Enid Vahr]] from [[Demophon]] prior to the [[Demophon supernova]].<ref name="BE" />

{{Char-stub}}
